instruction: Launch a premium 380 GSM drop shoulder Rust hoodie collection named 'Falcon Reborn' with 200 items, price ₹9,999, target 3.8x ROAS

research.deliverables: Targeted at Gen-Z luxury streetwear buyers in India. Colors: Falcon Rust (#D9541E), Midnight Black (#000000), Ash Grey (#808080). Competitor drops like Represent and Cole Buxton show high traction on heavy oversized fits.

design.deliverables: Cut: Drop shoulder, heavy oversized silhouette. Fabric: 380 GSM. Detailing: Falcon silhouette high-density embroidery in center-chest. Ribbed hem and cuffs.

identity.deliverables: Concept: 'Reborn Falcon - Reclaiming the premium Streetwear space.' Focuses on grit, luxury, and limited-edition numbers.

inventory.deliverables: Sizes distribution: XS (10%), S (20%), M (30%), L (25%), XL (10%), XXL (5%). Total allocation: 200 items.

pricing.deliverables: COGS: ₹1,500/unit. Gross Margin: 81.6%. Recommended retail launch price set to ₹9.

marketing.deliverables: Timeline: 7-day teaser on Instagram. VIP Early Access reservation link sent via WhatsApp. Drip campaign for waitlist.

social.deliverables: Captions: 'FALCON REBORN. Premium streetwear built from the ground up.' Hashtags: #streetwear #oversized #luxury #hoodie #foxfalcon

ads.deliverables: Targeting: Lookalike audiences from FOG, Represent, and Cole Buxton. Ad Copy: 'The wait is over. Experience premium streetwear with 380 GSM.'

sales.deliverables: Conversion Funnel: Cart drawer auto-upsells matching Rust socks for ₹499. High contrast Buy buttons.

pendingPlans.qualityCritique: Audit passed. Sizes ratios are well distributed and margins are healthy.
pendingPlans.riskAnalysis: Slight inventory risk if smaller sizes sit. Bidding caps must be watched closely.
pendingPlans.recommendation: Activate immediate performance marketing launch. Open VIP preorder window.
